title:
Lieta Nr. C30573322, Lietas arhīva Nr. CA-1307-23/30. The decision of 8 December 2023 by the Riga Regional Court.,

Latvia
text:
The applicant, a collective management
organisation of related rights, brought a claim of the simplified procedure
against the defendant, who rents out three apartments on a short-term basis,
for the prevention of the infringement of related rights, asking to recover
damages for 2 months of the infringement of related rights in the amount of EUR
223.59. The action is based on the fact that the defendant, in her three
apartments in Riga which are rented out on a short-term basis and include free
Wi-Fi and a flat-screen television with satellite channels, enables tenants to
listen to music without paying the applicant, as a collective management
organisation of related rights, a fee for the use of phonograms (music
recordings) instead of the public performance. The defendant denied
infringement.
plaintiff: Association Latvijas Izpildītāju un producentu apvienība
